subprograms.name: HAL_Delay
subprograms.code: function HAL_Delay return not null HAL.Time.Any_Delays

subprograms.name: Tick_Subscribe
subprograms.code: function Tick_Subscribe (Callback : not null Tick_Callback) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Subscribe a callback to the tick event. The function return True on
success, False if there's no more room for subscribers.

subprograms.name: Tick_Subscriber
subprograms.code: function Tick_Subscriber (Callback : not null Tick_Callback) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if callback is already a tick event subscriber

subprograms.name: Tick_Unsubscribe
subprograms.code: function Tick_Unsubscribe (Callback : not null Tick_Callback) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Unsubscribe a callback to the tick event. The function return True on
success, False if the callback was not a subscriber.
